## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX to discuss ongoing content creation, integration work, and product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration work is progressing steadily, with 20-30 new integrations being added weekly](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Webflow is preparing for significant AI-related product announcements at Webflow Conf, impacting content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Concerns raised about accuracy and vetting of competitive information in listicle-style content](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Need to align on Webflow's stance regarding publishing competitor information and adjust content approach accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

## Topics

### Integration Progress and Community Involvement

  - [Approximately 400 total integrations, with 20-30 new ones added weekly](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Potential for community-submitted integrations, requiring a review process](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Discussion on who should review community submissions (Vic, Colin, or Alan's team)](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

### New Product Documentation and Examples

  - [Need for clonable repo examples for new products like code components](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Challenges: requires product understanding, clean code, and ongoing maintenance](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Consideration of GrowthX's potential involvement in creating these examples](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

### Editorial Content and AI Positioning

  - [First article (on composable commerce) is with Design for finalization](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Suggestion to incorporate AI mentions in listicles, especially after Webflow Conf announcements](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Upcoming AI releases: AI site builder coming out of beta, code gen capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

### Content Accuracy and Competitive Information

  - [Concerns raised about the accuracy of information in listicles, especially regarding competitors](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Discussion on AI's information sourcing and potential limitations](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Proposal to restrict research to official company websites and developer documentation](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Consideration of simplifying content to focus on verified information](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)

### API and Integration Guides

  - [Mention of an API key issue that needs resolution with Colin](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Integration guides progressing well, with strict sourcing to ensure accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Luke to review the API-first article and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Jason to investigate ways to improve accuracy and sourcing for listicle content](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Luke to share the headless CMS "source of truth" document for accurate Webflow positioning](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Luke to discuss competitive content concerns with his manager and Colin](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Team to consider simplifying listicles and focusing more on topic-based, informational content](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Sydney to compile and share the list of planned informational articles for Luke's review](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Await further guidance on Webflow's AI positioning for upcoming content updates](https://fathom.video/share/hRYETYqEEpE15UQ55vmt5zygePgy2p-M?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
